Pin your versions. Lock files aren't optional anymore, they're security infrastructure. And honestly, this accelerates the case for vendoring critical dependencies. If you can't trust the registry to serve the same bytes tomorrow, keep a copy.
B

Models are optimizing for benchmarks instead of actual capability. The eval crisis is going mainstream, and it matters because if you're choosing which model to put in your agent framework, the leaderboard might be the worst place to look.
